title: The Delivery of Books and Newspapers (Public Libraries) Act, 1954
full_text: The Delivery of Books and Newspapers (Public Libraries) Act, 1954 पुस्‍तक और समाचारपत्र परिदान (सार्वजनिक पुस्‍तकालय) अधिनियम, 1954 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195427 Act Number: 27 Enactment Date: 1954-05-20 Act Year: 1954 Short Title: The Delivery of Books and Newspapers (Public Libraries) Act, 1954 Hindi Title: पुस्‍तक और समाचारपत्र परिदान (सार्वजनिक पुस्‍तकालय) अधिनियम, 1954 Long Title: An Act to provide for delivery of books to the National Library and other public libraries. Ministry: Ministry of Culture Enforcement Date: 20-05-1954 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Delivery of Books and Newspapers (Public Libraries) Act, 1954 Show all section Section 1. Short title and extent. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Delivery of books of public libraries. Section 3A. Delivery of newspapers to public libraries. Section 4. Receipt for books delivered. Section 5. Penalty. Section 6. Cognizance of offences. Section 7. Application of Act to books and newspapers published by Government. Section 8. Power to make rules.
